name: medical billing specialists processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For medical billing specialists processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry causes cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of appointment logs instead of manual entry.
problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of appointment logs into billing submissions
